title: I Lived with You
writer: Ivor Novello, George A. Cooper, H. Fowler Mear
actors: Ursula Jeans, Ida Lupino, Minnie Rayner
plot: A young London woman meets an impoverished Russian prince. She brings him home to live with her middle-class family. The prince has diamonds from the last czar to sell. The money and his royal fame transform the family's lives.
